steps.title: Evaluate Each Choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'f(x) = 5x': Slope is 5, not 7, and y-intercept is 0, not 5. ✗
  • Choice B — 'f(x) = 35x': Slope is 35 (the product of 7 and 5) and y-intercept is 0. Neither matches. ✗
  • Choice C — 'f(x) = 7x + 5': Slope is 7 and y-intercept is 5. Both match the given information. ✓
  • Choice D — 'f(x) = 12x + 5': Slope is 12 (the sum of 7 and 5), not 7. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
